name: ETDA APT Groups
description: Search threat-actor groups and their tools Tool: https://apt.etda.or.th/cgi-bin/listgroups.cgi. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1076 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map ETDA APT Groups output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved ETDA APT Groups output file to parse instead of running it live.
